import Normal from "../../_normal.mdx";

# Third-party

本章包含以下 API 分组：

- `tinyusb_device`(tinyusb-device.mdx): TinyUSB Device-mode support for the RP2040. The TinyUSB documentation site can be found here.
- `tinyusb_host`(tinyusb-host.mdx): TinyUSB Host-mode support for the RP2040.
- `pico_mbedtls`(pico-mbedtls.mdx): pico-sdk wrapper library for mbedtls the documentation for which is here.

<Normal />
